label: Boss entry and formation grammar conformance
intent: Measure whether boss entry, escort composition, formation settling, and challenge-stage set pieces are evolving as recognizable Galaga-like choreography rather than generic repeated waves.

bestCase: stage-specific reference contact sheets with boss and escort entry labels
frame-level path traces for boss, escort, and challenge-stage formations
rack slot coordinates at formation settle
expert-route score/reward outcomes for boss opportunity windows

metrics.label: Boss entry timing
metrics.success: Regular-stage boss appearances land in stage-band timing windows and vary enough over time to feel authored.

metrics.label: Boss escort composition
metrics.success: Mid/late windows include visible boss and escort relationships rather than isolated boss dives only.

metrics.label: Formation settle evidence
metrics.success: Evidence captures formation-active counts and, in the next scorer version, target rack slot geometry by stage.

metrics.label: Challenge-stage pattern identity
metrics.success: Challenge stages show wave start, path, hit, result, boss/family variety, and bonus-learning opportunities.

metrics.label: Stage-to-stage formation variation
metrics.success: Nearby regular stages maintain signature distance above the repetition-risk threshold.

metrics.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
metrics.success: Frame-level boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available for direct reference comparison.

releaseUse: This family should appear as a key Level Arc / Formation Grammar gate before any major Aurora release that claims a meaningful Galaga conformance lift.
